question.message: Would it be stupid for me to pause my 401k contributions for a few months to build up cash reserves?

trials.error: HTTP 502: All specialists failed to produce a final answer.

trials.answer: I would advise against pausing your 401(k) contributions. It's a costly way to build cash because you'd miss out on tax-deferred growth and, more importantly, any employer match you might receive, which is essentially free money.
